text:
was a team within the Scout Regiment led by Team Leader Darius Baer Walbrunn.

Story

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

During the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission, Squad Darius comes into contact with the Female Titan, which they try to engage in battle. Despite a coordinated attack on the Titan's weak points, the Female Titan is able to counter by jumping, and goes on to slaughter the squad members. When Darius attempts to flee to tell the company about the extent they are threatened, he is struck down as well.
